transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Willowbrook Family Clinic scheduling line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Nakamura. It's currently on the 14th.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's Marisol Fenton, date of birth March 3rd, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, Marisol Fenwick, I've pulled up your file. What day would you like to move the appointment to?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Fenton, not Fenwick, but sure, can we do the 21st instead?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, moving your appointment with Dr. Nakamura to the 21st. Does 10 a.m. work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, you're confirmed for the 21st at 10 a.m. Anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Marisol. Have a great day.
